title: Pie Plus+
description: You ever just want to eat pies in Minecraft. Well do I have a mod for you.
body:
Pie Plus+ is a mod which aims to add a wide variety of vanilla style pies to the game for the players enjoyment. 
![Pies Displayed on a Hill](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64ae553bfb6bb09085fbb5e1ddc39edd20db202d.png)

![3 new pies atop a cherry blossom hill](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AFeSVHpn/images/20b39dba034f5a61003e4cd190b7a86eef690661.png)

![A lone Buttermilk Pie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AFeSVHpn/images/7336b7fce08b0b8595f3531fd5d08d26e613d397.png)
Currently Pie Plus+ adds 14 different pies to the game which can all be crafted in a crafting table. Recipes don't get complicated just being the pumpkin pie recipe with the pumpkin exchanged.

Some of these pies grant effects when eaten such as Glowberry Pie giving the player the Glowing status effect.
